specification:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<CHTBillingRules createdBy="Sunil CHT" date="2025-05-09">
	<Comment>Testing CPB Generator Tool</Comment>
	<RuleGroup startDate="2025-05-01" endDate="2025-08-31">
		<BillingRule name="BR 1 - RG 1" includeDataTransfer="true">
			<BasicBillingRule billingAdjustment="1" billingRuleType="percentDiscount"/>
			<Product productName="Amazon EC2">
				<Region name="eu-east-1"/>
				<UsageType name="UT 1"/>
				<UsageType name="UT 2"/>
				<Operation name="Op1"/>
				<Operation name="Op2"/>
				<RecordType name="RT1"/>
				<RecordType name="RT2"/>
				<InstanceProperties instanceType="IT" instanceSize="IS" reserved="false" />
				<InstanceProperties instanceType="IT2" instanceSize="IS2" reserved="true" />
				<LineItemDescription contains="LID" />
				<LineItemDescription startsWith="LID2" />
				<SavingsPlanOfferingType name="SPOT"/>
				<SavingsPlanOfferingType name="SPOT2"/>
			</Product>
		</BillingRule>
		<BillingRule name="BR 2 - RG 1" includeDataTransfer="true">
			<BasicBillingRule billingAdjustment="3" billingRuleType="fixedRate"/>
			<Product productName="AmazonCloudWatch">
				<UsageType name="usge"/>
				<Operation name="op"/>
				<RecordType name="rt"/>
				<InstanceProperties instanceType="it" instanceSize="is" reserved="false" />
			</Product>
		</BillingRule>
	</RuleGroup>
	<RuleGroup startDate="2025-05-01" endDate="2025-05-31">
		<BillingRule name="BR 1 - RG 2" includeDataTransfer="true">
			<BasicBillingRule billingAdjustment="2" billingRuleType="percentDiscount"/>
			<Product productName="ANY">
				<UsageType name="UT3"/>
				<Operation name="OP3"/>
				<LineItemDescription contains="LID" />
				<SavingsPlanOfferingType name="SPOT"/>
			</Product>
		</BillingRule>
	</RuleGroup>
</CHTBillingRules>
